name: Picante Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine potatoes, corn, pepper, and onions in a medium bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, combine Picante sauce, oil, vinegar, cumin, and salt; mix well.
3. Gently toss the potato mixture with the sauce mixture; chill.
4. Sprinkle with cilantro and serve with additional Picante sauce.
